data.body:
=== CORRECTION: "EXP" was the design's existing T2 empirical-probe — registry reconciliation ===

Joe caught that round-4's "EXP" should not have been a NOVEL criterion. Correct: EXP = T2 empirical probe, which
is in v4 §5 (design-of-record). Reconciled the FULL v4 §5 registry vs everything implemented across rounds.
Writeup: docs/experiments/criteria-registry-reconciliation.md; corrected set docs/experiments/data/criteria_v4.json.

WHERE IT GOT LOST: round 1 I compiled criteria.json as a 12-item "Layer-2 judgment subset" and DROPPED ALL 13
overlays (T1-T9, incl T2). Round 3 criteria_v2 was built from that subset (added back only T5a/b/c/e). Round 4,
when empirical-validation was needed, I did NOT recognize it as the existing T2 and reinvented it as "EXP". ROOT
CAUSE: no canonical registry file derived from v4 §5 — each criteria_vN was built from the previous subset, so
dropped criteria never returned and a real one got reinvented.

OTHER CRITERIA LOST (in v4 §5, never reconciled):
- T2 empirical probe — reinvented as EXP (now renamed back).
- T3 integration feasibility — LOST, never implemented/tested.
- T4 compat/destructiveness-as-explicit-choice — LOST, never implemented/tested (P7 destructive sniff was meant to
  escalate to it).
- T5d accessibility — dropped from the criteria set (round-4 router keyword only).
- Dedicated coherence pass (cross-section contradictions) — was COH in round 1, then dropped (folded into E1).
- G3/G4 container child-coverage — designed, never RUN (now runnable: epic has children).
- T1/T6/T7/T9 — router-classified but never run as review criteria.
- DET tier P2/P3/P5/P6/P7 — never exercised (code tier, separate).

FIX: renamed EXP->T2 (the round-4 experimental result stands, under its real id); restored T3/T4/T5d + the COH
coherence pass as descriptors in criteria_v4.json (17 descriptors), grounded in the DSO catalog. The full v4 §5
registry + the reconciliation doc are now the canonical source so subsetting can't silently drop a criterion
again. Corrected epic 5fd2 (EXP->T2 + a registry-reconciliation note), the round-4 doc (correction banner), and
the layer2 (EXP->T2) + overlays (full T1-T9 enumerated) child stories. All still pass check_ac + clarity.

STILL OWED (design, no data): G3/G4, T3/T4/T5d, T1/T6/T7/T9 as review criteria, and DET P2/P3/P5/P6/P7. Recommend
a validation pass over the restored/never-run overlays + container criteria so the whole registry has coverage.
